title: delphinium phrygium subsp. phrygium
intro: Delphinium phrygium subsp. phrygium, also known as the Cretan larkspur, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region, particularly in Greece and Turkey. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to the presence of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Delphinium phrygium subsp. phrygium include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and soothe various health conditions.
